title: Sleep to Heal
description: Players heal over time and remove debuffs while sleeping. Configurable healing rates and effects.
body:
# Sleep to Heal

A lightweight survival enhancement plugin that adds realistic healing mechanics to Minecraft. When players rest in beds, they gradually restore health and recover from negative status effects, making beds more meaningful beyond just setting spawn points.

## Features

**Gradual Health Restoration**
Players slowly regain health while sleeping, with configurable heal rates. By default, players heal 0.5 hearts per second, but this can be adjusted to fit your server's balance.

**Automatic Debuff Removal**
Sleeping removes harmful potion effects including poison, wither, weakness, slowness, nausea, blindness, mining fatigue, and more. Give your players a reason to actually use their beds!

**Fully Configurable**
Customize every aspect of the plugin through the config.yml file:
- Heal amount per tick
- Healing tick interval
- Minimum time in bed before healing starts
- Toggle negative effect removal
- Enable/disable sound effects
- Enable/disable chat messages

**Performance Friendly**
Designed to be lightweight with minimal impact on server performance. No dependencies required.

Perfect for survival servers that want to add more strategic depth to the sleeping mechanic!
